sizeEnforcement: Inside the Vercel handler, Content-Length is rejected before PlayReceipt reserializes or audits the parsed body; Vercel may already have received and parsed the request and separately enforces its own 4.5 MB platform limit
the serialized parsed payload is independently rejected when it exceeds the cap
the local Node adapter counts streamed request bytes before parsing
contract.persistence: The repository contains no database or submission-history write path; responses use cache-control: no-store.
